channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marikina City encourages government employees to bike to work amid fuel crisis
item.description: In response to rising fuel prices, the Marikina local government has introduced an initiative called “Padyak Papasok: Bike to Work.” Launched by Mayor Marjorie Ann Teodoro on March 16, 2026, the progr...

item.title: Hilda Baci and Miskay Launch Capsule Fashion Collection Reflecting Her Personal Style
item.description: Hilda Baci don extend her talents from kitchen go fashion world with her new capsule collection wey she drop in partnership with Miskay Boutique. Dem call am 'Signature' collection, and e dey reflect ...

item.title: Kenya to Export Agricultural Products to China Without Tariffs Starting May 2026
item.description: Kenya is set to start exporting a range of agricultural products to China duty-free from May 1, 2026, Agriculture CS Mutahi Kagwe has confirmed. This move comes after President William Ruto's recent s...

item.title: India’s Strategic Balancing in West Asia Amid Rising Regional Tensions
item.description: The recent sinking of the Iranian warship IRIS Dena by the United States in the Indian Ocean on March 4, 2026, has brought the West Asia conflict uncomfortably close to South Asia. Millions of South A...

item.title: Government ensures salaries of employees released ahead of Eid
item.description: ISLAMABAD – Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has directed that salaries of all government employees be released before Eid, assuring the public that his government is working on both immediate economic r...

item.title: Punjab Approves Purchase of 10 Vehicles for High Court Judges Amid Austerity Measures
item.description: LAHORE: The Punjab cabinet on Monday gave its approval for buying 10 new vehicles for the superior judiciary, while simultaneously announcing contributions to the Prime Minister’s austerity fund. Init...

item.title: Gregory Bovino to Retire After Career in U.S. Border Patrol
item.description: Gregory Bovino, a long-serving U.S. Border Patrol official, announced his plans to retire at the end of March 2026. Bovino joined the Border Patrol in 1996 and held prominent roles, including commande...

item.title: Israel reports destruction of plane previously used by Iran's late Supreme Leader
item.description: On Monday, March 16, 2026, Israeli military announced say dem don destroy one aircraft wey the late Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei use before, and e dey at Mehrabad airport for Tehran. The plane ...

item.title: Zambales lawmaker retracts bill proposing renaming of PRMSU
item.description: Zambales 2nd District Representative Doris “Bing” Maniquiz announced she will withdraw House Bill 8520, which sought to rename President Ramon Magsaysay State University (PRMSU) to Zambales State Univ...

item.title: Starmer maintains cautious stance on Iran as opposition parties struggle to respond
item.description: Keir Starmer held a press conference in Downing Street to outline the UK government's stance amid rising tensions between the US and Iran. Starmer emphasised that Britain would remain largely uninvolv...

item.title: Kenya Hosts Africa Urban Forum to Boost Housing and Urban Development
item.description: Kenya is set to host the Second Africa Urban Forum (AUF2) in Nairobi from April 8-10, marking a major step in shaping Africa’s urban future. The forum, themed 'Adequate Housing for All', comes at a cr...

item.title: Diesel spill on Pacific Motorway causes major traffic delays in Brisbane
item.description: Early this morning, a ute towing a trailer believed to contain a diesel fuel can crashed on the Pacific Motorway near exit five at Greenslopes, resulting in a significant diesel spill. The incident oc...

item.title: FCC emphasises proper announcement of reserved judgements and warns against premature leaks
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Federal Constitutional Court (FCC) has issued a stern warning to judges about the circulation of reserved judgements before they are formally announced. The court described such actions...

item.title: Series of Explosions Hit Maiduguri, Including Maiduguri Teaching Hospital During Ramadan
item.description: Na Monday evening, Maiduguri, the capital of Borno State, gatz serious wahala as multiple explosions burst for different parts of the city. The first blast happen around 7pm during iftar, the time wey...

item.title: Canada Considering Non-Offensive Military Support Amid Gulf Shipping Tensions
item.description: Canada’s Defence Minister, David McGuinty, has indicated that the Canadian government is open to providing military assistance in the Gulf region amid rising tensions with Iran, but clarified that Can...

item.title: Parliament investigates Showmax closure and its impact on local content and jobs
item.description: Parliament's Portfolio Committee on Communications and Digital Technologies is taking steps to examine the implications of Canal+'s decision to shut down the streaming service Showmax, previously oper...

item.title: India’s Gas Shortage Exposed Amid Iran Conflict and Foreign Policy Challenges
item.description: India is experiencing widespread cooking gas shortages due to the ongoing conflict involving Iran, a country critical to India’s energy imports. Despite having no role in the conflict, India is heavil...

item.title: Major Winter Storm Shuts Down Northeastern Ontario, Disrupting Travel and Services
item.description: A historic two-day winter storm has blanketed parts of northeastern Ontario with heavy snow and freezing rain, causing dangerous travel conditions. Environment Canada has warned that the storm will co...

item.title: Social media backlash after photos show Oscars venue left covered in rubbish by attendees
item.description: A photo revealing the Dolby Theatre strewn with litter following the 2026 Academy Awards has triggered widespread criticism of Hollywood celebrities’ behaviour. Shared by journalist Matt Neglia, the i...

item.title: The Role of BIM Electrical Modeling in Sustainable Architecture
item.description: Sustainability in architecture is increasingly vital, focusing on creating buildings that are both efficient and environmentally responsible. Building Information Modeling (BIM), particularly BIM elec...
